summary: Free subscriber ESPN/Sunday Night Baseball archive - Feed Select modal
description:
GIVEN a user is a free subscriber
AND ESPN Sunday Night Baseball is archived

steps.action: WHEN the user selects the ESPN Sunday Night Baseball game tile
steps.result:
THEN the feed select modal displays
AND the following title text is displayed "Subscription Required"
AND the following description text is displayed "A subscription is needed to watch this game."
AND the following title text is displayed "Full Game Access"
AND an [Upgrade Plan] button is displayed below "Full Game Access"
AND the user cannot playback the feed
AND the user is taken to the paywall/subscriptions page after selecting the [Upgrade Plan] button
